overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character exploring a cozy, medieval-style bedroom with stone walls, wooden ceiling beams, and warm lamplight. The character walks a continuous loop around the room's perimeter, examining canopy beds and wooden furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval dormitory left wing with canopy beds

agents.ego_description: walking into the room and examining the left side furniture including a tall wooden wardrobe and a canopy bed with green bedding

entered.detail: arched stone doorway framing the entrance to the room
large bed with green bedspread and wooden posts
tall dark wooden cabinet with carved details
stone fireplace on the far wall with mantle
large circular patterned rug covering the floor center
oval mirror mounted on the wall near the wardrobe
small wooden table beside the bed
white ceramic basin on wooden stand

segments.scene_description: The character enters a warm, stone-walled medieval bedroom through an arched doorway. Moving along the left wall, they pass a ceramic washstand and oval mirror, then approach a large wooden wardrobe and a canopy bed with green bedding. The room features exposed wooden ceiling beams, a circular woven rug, and warm lamplight illuminating the stone fireplace on the far wall.

agents.ego_description: moving through the center of the room toward the stone fireplace, glancing at wall paintings

entered.detail: long wooden dresser with multiple drawers
several framed pictures hanging above the fireplace
comfortable chair with fabric upholstery near the far wall
tall shelf holding books and objects
second bed with brown bedding on the right side
closed wooden door on the far right wall

segments.scene_description: Moving into the central area, the character approaches the stone fireplace on the far wall, passing framed paintings above the mantle. The circular woven rug lies beneath their feet as they turn toward the right side of the room, where a second bed with brown bedding and a wooden dresser become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: right side sleeping area near exit archway

agents.ego_description: walking along the right wall past a bed and lit nightstand, heading back toward the entrance archway

entered.detail: illuminated lamp on a small table beside the bed
decorative wooden bench near the exit
decorative fabric hangings on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character explores the right side of the room, passing close to a wooden bed with a lit table lamp on its nightstand. They continue past a carved wooden bench and wall tapestries, turning toward the stone archway entrance to complete their circuit of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cozy medieval bedroom, tracing a full circuit from the entrance back to the starting archway. It begins as the character enters through a stone doorway, gliding along the left wall past a ceramic washstand and a canopy bed with green bedding under exposed wooden ceiling beams. As the camera moves into the center of the room, the perspective shifts toward the far wall to pass a stone fireplace and framed paintings while crossing a circular woven rug. The scene then opens up to the right side of the chamber, moving past a second bed with brown bedding and a lit table lamp before gliding by a carved wooden bench and wall tapestries. Finally, the camera turns back toward the original stone archway to complete the loop of the warm, lamplit space.
